name: Defold
description: Free, open-source game engine maintained by the Defold Foundation (previously King). Targets mobile, web, and desktop with a lightweight Lua scripting API and zero-cost publishing.

seo.title: Defold — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Defold: Free, open-source game engine maintained by the Defold Foundation (previously King). Targets mobile, web, and desktop with a lightweight Lua scripting A

when_to_use: Mobile-first 2D game shipping to iOS and Android with 0% royalty
HTML5 game embedded in web page via Defold web export
Lua-scripted game jam entry built in 48 hours
Lightweight game client for a casual hyper-casual title
Cross-platform puzzle game published on itch.io for free

pros: Tiny runtime and fast iteration on mobile and web
Truly free with no revenue share or hidden fees
Lua scripting with a clean message-based architecture
HTML5 export performance is best-in-class for 2D
cons: 3D support exists but lags far behind Godot and Unity
Editor UX feels sparse compared to modern engines
Asset store and community smaller than competitors
Lua-only means no C# or TypeScript alternatives
review.verdict: Underrated 2D mobile engine with excellent output size; ignored by most because Unity and Godot dominate mindshare.
review.best_for: Indie 2D mobile and HTML5 games where tiny binaries and zero fees matter
review.not_for: 3D-heavy titles or teams wanting C#, visual scripting, or massive asset store
